name: kshana
description: Run the validated Kshana PNT-resilience engine from an AI agent — SGP4/SDP4, IAU frames, GNSS availability/DOP/ARAIM, Allan/MTIE timing, GNSS-INS fusion and quantum-sensor models. The agent calls the real, externally-validated engine instead of guessing the math. Requires the kshana-mcp server on PATH (cargo install kshana-mcp) or Docker.
